Data link layer → Handles error detection

Transport Layer → Ensures reliable data transfer.

structured_answers.answer_text: The Domain Name System (DNS) is used to translate human readable domain names to IP addresses. This helps computers locate servers.

Load Balancing is the process of distributing incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure no single server is overloaded. This improves system performance by sharing workload ensures high availability and scalability.

The OSI (Open System Interconnection) model is a conceptual framework used to understand how data is transmitted over a network Physical layer → Transmits raw bits Data link layer → Handles error detection Network Layer - Responsible for routing Transport Layer → Ensures reliable data transfer. Session Layer - Manages communication session
Data Transmission over the internet follows a structured process using networking protocols and devices.

(a) User Request → The user enters URL in browser. DNS translates it into an IP address. Data Packet Formation → The data is divided into smaller units called packets. Protocol Handling Reassembling Display. Key Component : Sender and Receiver → DNS → Router & Switcher - Transmission Media → Protocols : The internet is a combination of Packet switching, routing and Protocol to ensure fast, reliable and accurate communication between devices world wide.
